creator: martti.kuparinen@iki.fi
text:
On Thu, 6 Sep 2001, Peter Pentchev wrote:

> In a separate message to -ports, you state that you have received
> confirmation from the author that the distfile change was valid.
> Still, do you have any idea what changed in the distfile?

The author re-created the tar file few minutes after the release
announcement and he didn't inform me about this (well he did, today,
after asking about the checksum :-)

I guess I was too fast to serve the FreeBSD community...

Martti

---
Martti Kuparinen <martti.kuparinen@iki.fi>              NetBSD - No media hype
http://www.iki.fi/~kuparine/                            http://www.netbsd.org/
